headline: Hasbro and Whirlpool: Two Iconic American Brands Reinventing Themselves Under Pressure
summary: Hasbro (NASDAQ: HAS) and Whirlpool (NYSE: WHR) just reported earnings that tell two very different reinvention stories. Hasbro crushed estimates and proved its pivot to digital IP is working. Whirlpool missed on both lines and is betting its recovery on housing, cost cuts, and a promotional environment that finally seems to be calming down. Magic ... Hasbro and Whirlpool: Two Iconic American Brands Reinventing Themselves Under Pressure

headline: How The Hasbro (HAS) Story Is Evolving With Gaming Upside And Tariff Shifts
summary: Hasbro's fair value estimate has been nudged from US$113.38 to US$114.50, a small move that still matters if you are tracking how the story is evolving. Analysts tying this adjustment to stronger than expected Q4 results and a 2026 outlook that leaves room for gaming and entertainment upside are helping shape where expectations sit today. As you read on, you will see how these shifts in price targets fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch next. Stay updated as the Fair Value...

headline: Lego keeps beating the toy industry. Its secret weapon is not what you'd expect
summary: Lego on Tuesday reported a 12% jump in revenue for fiscal year 2025 and reported consumer sales that far outpace the broader toy industry.
